title: Let's Do Reimagined
description: A polished resource pack replacing flat Let’s Do items with immersive, well-scaled 3D models
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/eG6FMuF.png) ## About Flat 2D icons can feel out of place in the cozy, detailed world of the Let’s Do mods.
Drinks, kitchen tools, furniture, and everyday items often lack the depth and personality they deserve. This resource pack enhances the visual experience by replacing those flat items with carefully crafted 3D models, designed to match the scale, style, and warm atmosphere of the Let’s Do ecosystem. ![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/Aw70ZQM.png) ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ[](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pommel-held-item-models)


![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/xmefPMM.jpeg)

While playing with the **Let’s Do** mods, the default flat 2D items often feel too simple and unremarkable. This resource pack reimagines them by replacing them with detailed **3D models** that better capture the atmosphere, style, and cozy vibe of the Let’s Do mods.

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/SEn6ZX5.jpeg)

With this resource pack, you will receive: - 30+ items remade using **3D models** - Improved visual consistency when holding items - A more immersive and polished gaming experience

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/SVbsZub.jpeg)

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/J2Qktjx.png) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-bakery-farm-charm-compat) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-beachparty) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-brewery-farm-charm-compat) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-farm-charm) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-candlelight-farm-charm-compat) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-furniture) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-herbal-brews) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-lilis-pottery) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-nethervinery) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-vinery) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-lilis-lucky-lures) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-alpine-whispers) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-wildernature) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-camping) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-meadow) ![faq](https://i.imgur.com/UROXzDQ.png) ❔ **Will this pack break my game or the mod?** ✅ Absolutely not! This is a standard resource pack that only changes visual models. It is completely safe to use. ❔ **Do I need OptiFine?** ✅ No, this pack works perfectly fine without it! ❔ **Will you add models for new items?** ✅ Yes! I plan to update the pack and add 3D models for new items introduced in future updates of the Let's Do mods. ❔ Can I use this pack in my modpack? ✅ Of course! You are free to include this resource pack in your modpacks — it’s designed to work great with them ![right](https://i.imgur.com/3cQq0hE.png) * Original Mod Author: [satisfy](https://www.curseforge.com/members/satisfy/projects) — thanks for the amazing mod! ⚖️ Rights: This project is a fan-made resource pack. All rights for the original mod belong to its creator, satisfy. We are simply enhancing its visual presentation.
